caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio against a background of grey acoustic foam panels. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a small red and black logo that reads "Stay Authentic". He is positioned in front of a professional silver microphone mounted on a black boom arm. As the sequence progresses, the man is captured in a mid-shot, looking slightly to his left. His facial expression shifts subtly; in the initial frames, he has a neutral gaze with a slightly open mouth, but by the final frame, his eyes widen and his brows lift, conveying a look of surprise or realization while he continues to face the same direction. The camera angle and the studio equipment remain static throughout the clip.
